title: Ignore and purge local auto-improvement scratch artifacts
description: Add focused ignore rules for one-off auto-improvement notes, approval sentinels, async-fix scripts, and editor backup suffixes; purge stale untracked copies so git status stays actionable for future cron cycles.

title: Add Node 22 verification guard
description: Add a repo-local check or script that refuses frontend verification under Node 18 and points cron jobs to /home/ubuntu/.hermes/node/bin so Vitest and ESLint use modern Web APIs.

title: Quiet focused lint warning reports
description: Tune focused auto-improvement lint commands or config so ignored test files and baseline no-shadow warnings do not obscure new errors in TEST_REPORT.json.

title: Surface chat mobile smoke checklist in UI docs
description: Capture the Android/WebView chat smoke scenarios as a short checked-in QA note so future mobile UI changes verify header spacing, composer insets, agent picker, and null text regressions consistently.
